top_signals.title: US-Iran Interim Deal Takes Effect | The Pulse 06/18/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Philippe Botteri, Accel Partner; Alexandra Dublanche, Choose Paris Region President; Stephan Mayer, Trumpf CEO for Machine Tools; Andris Kulbergs, Latvian Prime Minister; Giorgio Pradelli, EFG International CEO (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Supervision Reform: Duties, Powers, and Accountability Consultation
top_signals.summary: This consultation covers subsidiary considerations related to the FCA taking over professional services firms' anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing supervision.

top_signals.title: F5 issues out-of-band patches for critical NGINX vulnerabilities
top_signals.summary: Cybersecurity company F5 has released out-of-band security updates to address multiple NGINX web server vulnerabilities, including two critical-severity flaws that could allow attackers to execute code on vulnerable systems. [...]
